title: TurboQuant Explained..
summary: TurboQuant is a Google quantization technique that reduces VRAM requirements and GPU memory pressure by compressing KV cache and vector representations. The method uses codebooks and vector quantization to achieve data compression while managing mean squared error and inner product error.
